programme.title: Dear David
programme.desc: Shortly after comic artist Adam responds to Internet trolls, he begins experiencing sleep paralysis while an empty rocking chair moves in the corner of his apartment. As he chronicles increasingly malevolent occurrences in a series of tweets, Adam begins to believe he is being haunted by the ghost of a dead child named David. Encouraged by his boss to continue the 'Dear David' thread, Adam starts to lose his grip on what is real.

programme.title: Hoon Payon
programme.desc: A young lad travels to a remote temple on an island to visit his brother, who has been living as a monk there. But he learns that his brother has gone missing after being framed for murder and theft. He decides to stay to investigate his brother's disappearance and to clear his name, only to discover more mysterious deaths in the adjacent village.

programme.title: Anything For Jackson
programme.desc: The sudden death of their only grandson, Jackson, prove to be too much grief for the overly religious elderly couple, Audrey and Dr Henry. Being Satanists, they uncover a spell that will allow them to resurrect Jackson in another vessel. They kidnap a pregnant woman with the intention of performing a 'reverse exorcism' by putting Jackson's essence into the woman's unborn child. Instead, the old couple accidentally open a portal to purgatory when various souls desire the vessel.

programme.title: Kulit
programme.desc: Satu demi satu pembunuhan misteri berlaku di sebuah perkampungan di Kelantan, di mana kulit mangsa akan di ambil dan dipercayai untuk dijadikan wayang kulit.

programme.title: Siapa Tutup Lampu
programme.desc: Five university friends, Akmal, Arif, Aryana, Azie and Amir go for a vacation in Genting Highlands. On the way home, they were involved in the accident which killed Amir instantly. While waiting for a doctor at the morgue to identify Amir's body, they are all locked inside. They experience strange disturbances. As they think it is Amir's restless spirit, they realize how much wrongdoings they have done to Amir despite his kindness. What would become of their friendship after this?

programme.title: Nightmare Side 2
programme.desc: Naya and Shelly both have a sixth sense and can see ghosts. However, Shelly keeps her condition secret, which makes Naya curious. At the same time, Naya starts listening to a supernatural programme on the local Bandung radio and her interest is piqued when she hears a discussion about supernatural events that are followed by horrific nightmares. However, she does not yet know the real reason behind her nightmares.

programme.title: Stalker
programme.desc: A young woman lives alone in a rented rooftop house. However, she cannot help shaking the feeling that she is not alone. After a bizarre experience, she slowly learns the truth about what happened in the house.

programme.title: Are You Scared
programme.desc: Six kidnapped teens awake to find themselves trapped in an abandoned factory, but they soon discover that their every move is being taped by a series of security cameras. A voice booms out, "Welcome to 'Are you Scared?'" They realize to their horror that they are on a reality show they applied to months ago, but this is nothing like they expected: no contracts, no producers and no way out... Jason, the cockiest of the bunch, is called out to play the first game, which ends with a literal bang. Kelly is the first to hear the echoing explosion and to realize that the show has turned deadly. She rounds up the others. Together they try desperately to find an escape route but an unseen figure is ever vigilant, biding his time until he's able to trap each of the teens one by one, forcing them to face their worst fears in games that they can't possibly survive as he exacts his horrific revenge.

programme.title: Teman Tidur
programme.desc: Amanda, a transfer student lives in a dormitory. She becomes close to Adam, and his gang. Their closeness triggers a cynical reaction from Davin, an excellent student. Still depressed over the death of his best friend, Kelly who committed suicide because of his viral erotic video, he suspects the Adam Gang spreads the video. Slowly, Kelly's spirit comes to haunt them through video chat terror, asking for justice for her death.

programme.title: Creepy Hide and Seek 2
programme.desc: When her student Ritsuko disappears, Ryoko is desperate to find her. When she discovers that Ritsuko was playing a strange online game of hide and seek, she begins to wonder if it could be related to her disappearance somehow. Ryoko then discovers that the game is more sinister than it appeared at first. It is linked to demonology and the supernatural. Will she be able to get past her fears and superstitions to discover what secrets the game of hide and seek might hold?

programme.title: The Missing
programme.desc: Iris, an architect, suffers from frequent hallucinations due to post-traumatic stress disorder after losing her younger sister to a kidnapping syndicate. Her ex-lover, Job, also an architect, invites her to go to Japan where he has been given the job of restoring a 100-year-old house belonging to Riku Watanabe. In Japan, they meet Aki and a fellow Filipino, Len, who is an intern. Soon, Iris is haunted by angry-looking yureis (Japanese ghosts) and learns about human sacrifices carried out at the house they are restoring.

programme.title: Siapa Tutup Lampu
programme.desc: Five university friends, Akmal, Arif, Aryana, Azie and Amir go for a vacation in Genting Highlands. On the way home, they were involved in the accident which killed Amir instantly. While waiting for a doctor at the morgue to identify Amir's body, they are all locked inside. They experience strange disturbances. As they think it is Amir's restless spirit, they realize how much wrongdoings they have done to Amir despite his kindness. What would become of their friendship after this?

programme.title: Tangisan Kubur
programme.desc: Salah seorang dari junior forensic mula didatangi oleh 'hantu' wanita mangsa bunuh. Dia dan rakan-rakan forensiknya mula membongkar rahsia wanita itu yang embawa mereka ke sebuah estet. Dan estet itu menyimpan satu rahsia yang mengerikan.

programme.title: Karya 12 - Alien Janda Baik
programme.desc: Kisah tentang sekumpulan makhluk asing yang terhempas di bumi dan cuba mencari jalan pulang. Pelbagai kejadian pelik terpaksa ditempuhi demi untuk pulang ke tempat asal.

programme.title: It Came From Below
programme.desc: While he was alive, Jessie's dad was passionate about tracking down a monster that was believed to dwell deep inside one of the local caves. He was often dismissed as a lunatic. Jessie's dad unexpectedly dies on one of his expeditions in the cave, leaving her in a depressive state. Her brother, Sam, and his friends Joanna and Marty try to get her out of her funk. The four of them decide to go spelunking in the cave with the ultimate aim of finding the monster and proving that Jessie and Sam's dad was right about the monster. In spite of warnings from the park rangers, they head into the cave where they find all the evidence they wanted. Problem is, will they ever get out alive to show it to anyone?

programme.title: Nightmare Side 2
programme.desc: Naya and Shelly both have a sixth sense and can see ghosts. However, Shelly keeps her condition secret, which makes Naya curious. At the same time, Naya starts listening to a supernatural programme on the local Bandung radio and her interest is piqued when she hears a discussion about supernatural events that are followed by horrific nightmares. However, she does not yet know the real reason behind her nightmares.

programme.title: Are You Scared
programme.desc: Six kidnapped teens awake to find themselves trapped in an abandoned factory, but they soon discover that their every move is being taped by a series of security cameras. A voice booms out, "Welcome to 'Are you Scared?'" They realize to their horror that they are on a reality show they applied to months ago, but this is nothing like they expected: no contracts, no producers and no way out... Jason, the cockiest of the bunch, is called out to play the first game, which ends with a literal bang. Kelly is the first to hear the echoing explosion and to realize that the show has turned deadly. She rounds up the others. Together they try desperately to find an escape route but an unseen figure is ever vigilant, biding his time until he's able to trap each of the teens one by one, forcing them to face their worst fears in games that they can't possibly survive as he exacts his horrific revenge.

programme.title: Without Name
programme.desc: While on assignment in the Irish woodland, land surveyor Eric sees shadows flitting between trees. He is fascinated yet disturbed. The shadows call out to him. If he answers, he will be their prisoner.

programme.title: Jackal
programme.desc: Jimmy Levine is a deprogrammer hired by Andrew Powell to rescue his son, Justin, from a murderous cult. The Powell family also consists of Andrew's wife Kathy, older son Campbell, Justin's girlfriend Samantha, as well as Justin and Samantha's baby, Zoey. They have gathered at Andrew's cabins in the woods to stage an intervention. Jimmy and Andrew stage a kidnapping and manage to get Justin back into the cabin. Strangely, in spite of various methods, Jimmy and the Powells simply cannot get through to Justin, who appears to have been thoroughly brainwashed. The cultists quickly track Justin down and surround the cabin. Beseiged, the occupants of the cabin are lured into traps one by one, and murdered in the most horrific ways imaginable. Finally, only Justin, Samantha and Zoey remain.

programme.title: Sis Ngesot
programme.desc: A band 'Sudu Garfu and The Napkins' is recording at 'Jinggles Studio' which is owned by a famous composer, Syafihi. While filming, the lights suddenly go out. Syafihi heads to the main switch box trying to fix the electricity, to no avail. Suddenly, the door to the studio is mysteriously locked and the band is visited by a strange ghost called 'Sis Ngesot' that appears from a corner of the room.

programme.title: Jenny
programme.desc: A young woman's answer to a horror Bloody Mary challenge turns awry as she instead unleashes an evil spirit from her past to return to her life.

programme.title: Crystal Inferno
programme.desc: At the 20th floor of a skyscraper, a gas leak has started a fire. Anne and Ben Bronson, two teenage kids, are trapped in a fiery inferno 20 storeys above the ground, while the fire is spreading throughout the entire building. From the 60th floor, their parents, Brianna and Tom, who were about to sign their divorce papers, will have to fight together to save their family from the flames. Even if Brianna is a brilliant structural engineer, will she find out a way to stop this uncontrolled fire?

programme.title: Mary
programme.desc: David buys a sailing boat that had been abandoned by the Coast Guard. He takes his wife Sarah, daughters Lindsey and Mary, Lindsey's boyfriend Tommy and David's friend Mike on a trip to Bermuda. The boat is christened Mary. While out at sea, tensions grow between the crew. Mary is acting strangely, while the already strained marriage between David and Sarah are further tested. Then, Tommy inexplicably attacks David. After committing him to an asylum, they hear that Tommy hanged himself. David and Sarah agree to turn around and abandon their disastrous trip, but more tragedy is in store for the journey home.

programme.title: Hantu Tok Mudim
programme.desc: Tok Mudim is the greatest ritual circumciser in his village whose reputation is tarnished when his assistant, Lebai Kulup, gets involved in a love triangle with Salmah, the prettiest girl in the village, and Borhan son of the Tok Penghulu. Due to his love for Salmah, Borhan meets Tok Mudim for a secret operation. Unbeknown to them, Lebai Kulup decides to sabotage the operation. Due to the failed operation, Tok Mudim is hunted by the villagers, and falls into a well to his death.

programme.title: Without Name
programme.desc: While on assignment in the Irish woodland, land surveyor Eric sees shadows flitting between trees. He is fascinated yet disturbed. The shadows call out to him. If he answers, he will be their prisoner.

programme.title: Pengantin Malam
programme.desc: A woman named Maya suffers from amnesia after a car accident. Ever since then, she is often haunted by a mysterious figure. Maya's husband, Razif, decides to take his wife to recuperate at his family villa.

programme.title: Fearsome
programme.desc: Seungyeon and his band are feeling uninspired, and decide to take a break in Chuncheon. While there, they put on a great show at a local club and are offered a seemingly great contract that comes with accommodation. After arriving at the dormitory, Jaehyuk gets an eerie feeling about the place. One by one, all the band members begin to hear creepy voices as though they are being watched. Almost as though ... they are not alone in the house...

programme.title: Panggilan Arwah
programme.desc: Amin yang sering diganggu oleh bayangan misteri seorang wanita yang terseksa di alam barzakh harus merungkai misteri mimpinya itu. Lakonan Zizan Nin & Tasha Shilla.

programme.title: Nightmare Side 2
programme.desc: Naya and Shelly both have a sixth sense and can see ghosts. However, Shelly keeps her condition secret, which makes Naya curious. At the same time, Naya starts listening to a supernatural programme on the local Bandung radio and her interest is piqued when she hears a discussion about supernatural events that are followed by horrific nightmares. However, she does not yet know the real reason behind her nightmares.

programme.title: Ditched
programme.desc: After a routine prison transfer crashes in the forest, young Inuit paramedic Melina finds herself surrounded by murderers with a mere 100 feet to climb out of a ditch to escape. When they are attacked by an unseen force in the forest, Melina's short journey to safety becomes the ultimate contest of wills.

programme.title: Creepy Hide and Seek 3
programme.desc: The third installation in the horror series is themed on 'solo hide and seek,' a seance technique famous as an urban legend. Sakura Kurata and Kosuke Tsukamoto are members of the movie club at their high school. They organize a movie shoot which revolves around the urban legend and occult game 'hide-and-seek alone'. The game involves a ritual with a doll to contact the dead. The students persuade a teacher to allow them to shoot the movie at midnight in the school. The students begin filming, and they soon experience a lot more than they expected.

programme.title: SCHOOL OF ROCK
programme.desc: A man redefines teaching by transforming his students into a high-voltage rock band.

programme.title: BARRY Ep06
programme.desc: Lock the door.

programme.title: EX MACHINA
programme.desc: An internet coder is sent to test and evaluate the capabilities and consciousness of his CEO's experiment in artificial intelligence.

programme.title: JUSTICE LEAGUE: WARWORLD
programme.desc: Members of the Justice League discover that war truly is hell as they fight their way through a maze of death and destruction on the planet WARWORLD!

programme.title: CINEMA VERITE: THE SAGA OF AN AMERICAN FAMILY
programme.desc: Witness the birth of reality TV in the early 1970s with the Loud family in this ground-breaking HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: THE DEBT
programme.desc: A former Mossad agent discovers a present truth that makes her question her past in this espionage thriller.

programme.title: SLEEPING DOGS
programme.desc: An ex-homicide detective with memory loss is forced to solve a brutal murder he can't recall.

programme.title: BARRY Ep05
programme.desc: Things have changed.

programme.title: Sugar
programme.desc: An HBO Original film of a baseball pitcher who struggles to pull his family out of poverty.

programme.title: Bean
programme.desc: The laughs are nonstop from London to Los Angeles! Comedian Rowan Atkinson is Bean!

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: On his journey to a French Riviera vacation, Mr. Bean falls face first into a series of hilarious mishaps.

programme.title: SCHOOL OF ROCK
programme.desc: A man redefines teaching by transforming his students into a high-voltage rock band.

programme.desc: Carter and Lee head to Hong Kong for a vacation, but become embroiled in a counterfeit money scam.

programme.desc: Bill and Chao put their plot into action. Mai Ling seeks forgiveness. Ah Toy visits Nellie's Sonoma winery.

programme.title: THE KILLER
programme.desc: When a feared contract killer refuses to murder a young blind woman on the orders of her handler, she finds herself hunted by old colleagues and a determined detective.

programme.title: LAND OF BAD
programme.desc: When a Delta Force team is ambushed in enemy territory, their only hope lies with an Air Force drone pilot to guide them through a brutal 48-hour battle for survival.

programme.title: THE KITE RUNNER
programme.desc: A California-based writer from Afghanistan must return home to face his past after a phone call from a friend of his father's.

programme.title: Disturbia
programme.desc: A teenager under house arrest begins spying on his neighbours, one of whom he suspects is a killer.

programme.title: FURIOUS 7
programme.desc: With a revenge-thirsty assassin hot on their heels, Dominic Toretto, Brian O'Conner and the rest of the crew come together as a team to protect their own.

programme.title: RUSH HOUR

programme.title: RUSH HOUR 2
programme.desc: Carter and Lee head to Hong Kong for a vacation, but become embroiled in a counterfeit money scam.

programme.title: aNGEL RODRiGUEZ
programme.desc: An HBO Original Movie, Angel Rodriguez tells the tale of Nicole, a social worker, and her relationship with Angel, a bright but troubled inner-city teen.

programme.title: TOO BIG to FAIL
programme.desc: A film on the 2008 Wall Street financial crisis that explores the inner sanctum of the powerful group that decided the fate of the world's economy.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: Jailed soccer star Vinnie Jones leads a group of prison inmates in a match against the prison guards

programme.title: The Corruptor
programme.desc: East meets West in this hard-hitting tale of deception, violence and betrayal in New York City's Chinatown.

programme.title: CREED
programme.desc: The former World Heavyweight Champion Rocky Balboa trains the son of his late friend and former rival Apollo Creed.

programme.title: 99 Songs
programme.desc: A musician must compose 100 songs in order to reunite with his lover. However, his journey of heartbreak, redemption, loss and faith allows him to discover much more than love.

programme.title: Crazy Singh
programme.desc: Bittu, a village simpleton, falls in love with a modern Saumya. Chaos ensues when their contrasting families meet to fix their marriage.

programme.title: Paheli
programme.desc: A ghost falls in love with a newly-wed woman and disguises himself as her husband when her spouse goes away for business.

programme.title: Drona
programme.desc: Aditya is an orphaned and lonely young man. He soon learns that he belongs to a family of ancestral warriors who guard a mystic source of cosmic energy, and he must now take up his responsibilities.

programme.title: Yuva
programme.desc: The lives of Michael, Arjun and Lallan collide when they are caught in a web of criminal conspiracies during the changing political scenario in Kolkata.

programme.title: Love Aaj Kal
programme.desc: In a technology-driven world where love is on speed-dial, two lovers find themselves overcoming distances, failures and heartbreaks to find each other again and preserve the love they had abandoned.

programme.title: 777 Charlie
programme.desc: Dharma, a broken man drowning in despair, finds his world transformed when he rescues Charlie, an abused pup. Later, they embark on a journey of hope and redemption.

programme.title: Golmaal 3
programme.desc: Cupid strikes when Pritam, a single father, comes across his college sweetheart, Geeta, in Goa. However, when their respective children go at war with each other, the two find it difficult to reunite.

programme.title: The Family Star
programme.desc: A hardworking middle-class man, who takes his family responsibilities very seriously, meets a research student renting his penthouse named Indu, who changes his life.

programme.title: Boo
programme.desc: Four friends are captivated by a horror novel during Halloween. However, reality becomes hazy as they read it, and they must confront the apparitional threat that manifests.

programme.title: Lucknow Central
programme.desc: Kishen, an inmate in a Lucknow jail, yearns to be set free. When he learns that a few prisoners must form a band, he sees it as his ticket to freedom.

programme.title: Bol
programme.desc: The patriarch of a religious Muslim family refuses to accept his transgender son, which creates a conflict within the family and ends up tearing them apart.

programme.title: Kannum Kannum Kollaiyadithaal
programme.desc: Siddharth and Kalli never seem to be short on money. However, when they meet the women of their dreams, they are pushed into reconsidering their career choices.

programme.title: Dus
programme.desc: Jamwaal, a terrorist, plans to wreak havoc in Canada when the Indian Prime Minister visits the nation. A team of special agents from India are sent to catch the terrorist.

programme.title: F2: Fun and Frustration
programme.desc: Two young men dream of controlling their wives after marriage, but their chauvinistic mindset backfires, leading to a series of hilarious and troublesome situations.

programme.title: Dhruva
programme.desc: A committed police officer, Dhruva, uncovers a web of organised crime headed by a scientist, Siddharth Abhimanyu. But when Dhruva tries to build a case against him, he faces many challenges.

programme.title: Andhadhun
programme.desc: Akash, a piano player pretending to be visually-impaired, unwittingly becomes entangled in a number of problems as he witnesses the murder of a former film actor.

programme.title: Raththam
programme.desc: While investigating his friend's murder, Ranjith, a journalist, unearths the sinister network responsible for a series of crimes.

programme.title: Munjya
programme.desc: Bittu awakens Munjya, a fearsome spirit with an insatiable desire for marriage, who relentlessly hunts him down in a chilling pursuit.

programme.title: Sanga Thamizhan
programme.desc: Murugan, a happy-go-lucky young man, falls in love with the daughter of Sanjay, an industrialist. However, trouble arises when Sanjay notices that Murugan looks like a figure from his dark past.

programme.title: 48 Hrs.
programme.desc: A weary cop springs a con out of jail for two days in order to track down a criminal.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West
programme.desc: A mysterious woman in the Old West is in danger from a band of ruthless gunmen.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines (1985)
programme.desc: Fortune hunter Allan Quatermain teams up with a resourceful woman to help her find her missing father lost in the wilds of 1900s Africa while being pursued by hostile tribes and a rival German explorer.

programme.title: Daredevil
programme.desc: A lawyer blinded by radioactive waste fights crime as an acrobatic martial arts superhero, using his other senses, which have been enhanced.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: A comet is discovered to be on a collision course with Earth. As doomsday nears, the human race prepares for the worst.

programme.title: The Lovely Bones
programme.desc: When 14-year-old Susie Salmon was murdered, she left her unfinished life behind. But now from her place in a strange but beautiful in-between world, she must help her father catch her killer and protect her family before she can finally move on. Filled with thrilling suspense, hope and the redeeming power of love.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines (1985)
programme.desc: Fortune hunter Allan Quatermain teams up with a resourceful woman to help her find her missing father lost in the wilds of 1900s Africa while being pursued by hostile tribes and a rival German explorer.

programme.title: Open S
programme.desc: A deer buddies up with a domesticated grizzly bear when the two animals are alone in the woods during hunting season.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: When Hiccup and Toothless discover an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new wild dragons and the mysterious Dragon Rider, the two friends find themselves at the center of a battle to protect the peace.

programme.title: Bride Wars
programme.desc: When a clerical error causes a clash in wedding dates, two best friends who'd do anything for each other find themselves in a no-holds-barred, take-no-prisoners struggle that threatens to erupt into all-out war.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West
programme.desc: A mysterious woman in the Old West is in danger from a band of ruthless gunmen.

programme.title: Open S
programme.desc: A deer buddies up with a domesticated grizzly bear when the two animals are alone in the woods during hunting season.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: When Hiccup and Toothless discover an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new wild dragons and the mysterious Dragon Rider, the two friends find themselves at the center of a battle to protect the peace.

programme.title: Bride Wars
programme.desc: When a clerical error causes a clash in wedding dates, two best friends who'd do anything for each other find themselves in a no-holds-barred, take-no-prisoners struggle that threatens to erupt into all-out war.

programme.title: The Quiet Man
programme.desc: A tired American ex-boxer returns to his native hamlet in Ireland to win the hand of a spirited young woman. He is confronted by strict local customs and the woman's belligerent brother. Set in the verdant Irish countryside, this lively film has beautiful scenery, brilliant repartee, and local charm.

programme.title: Star Trek (2009)
programme.desc: A prequel focusing on a young James T. Kirk and Mr. Spock, chronicling their first meeting at Starfleet Academy and their first space mission.

programme.title: Open S
programme.desc: A deer buddies up with a domesticated grizzly bear when the two animals are alone in the woods during hunting season.

programme.title: Daredevil
programme.desc: A lawyer blinded by radioactive waste fights crime as an acrobatic martial arts superhero, using his other senses, which have been enhanced.

programme.title: For a Few Dollars More
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood is the 'Man With No Name,' who teams up with equally lethal Lee Van Cleef in pursuit of a sadistic killer and his band of desperadoes in this non-stop action classic.

programme.title: The Hawaiians
programme.desc: Captain Whip returns to Hawaii. He's inherited 'worthless' land. He starts a plantation, staffed with a Chinese couple from his ship. Drilling thru lava for water and stealing/smuggling pineapple from French Guyana, things look brighter.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: the Cradle of Life
programme.desc: Lara Croft (Jolie) is back in action and faces her most perilous mission: to recover what ancient civilization believed to be the essence of all evil, Pandora's Box.

programme.desc: The filmmaker shines a light on the lives of five wild brown bears inhabiting the Kamchatka Peninsula, exploring their daily adventures and activities.

programme.title: Wild for the Night
programme.desc: When an ex-convict returns home to solve his sister's murder, the authority forces him to go undercover to help them bust illegal activities at a night club.

programme.title: Memoirs of an Invisible Man
programme.desc: An unusual accident renders a company executive entirely invisible. While being chased by an intelligence officer, he must come to terms with his new situation.

programme.title: JFK
programme.desc: When Jim Garrison, a district attorney, embarks on a mission to uncover the truth behind John F Kennedy's assassination, he faces fierce resistance from the government.

programme.title: A Time to Kill
programme.desc: After his ten-year-old daughter is raped, Carl murders her perpetrators. He then faces a trial and calls upon his friend Jake Tyler, a lawyer, to help him win the case.

programme.title: The Artist
programme.desc: Peppy Miller falls in love with the silent film star George Valentin. However, things change when Peppy becomes a famous actor while George's career goes downhill with the introduction of talkies.

programme.title: The Family Fang
programme.desc: After the police inform them about their parents' mysterious disappearance, two siblings embark on a mission to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Southpaw
programme.desc: After a devastating accident shatters his world, a once-celebrated champion boxer spirals into a destructive abyss. Subsequently, he decides to fight for his daughter and revive his fading career.

programme.title: Gone Girl
programme.desc: On his fifth anniversary, Nick Dunne reports his wife missing. As his portrait of a blissful union begins to crumble, suspicions of murder build.

programme.title: Heat
programme.desc: A detective decides to catch a highly intelligent seasonal criminal who has vowed to pull off one last robbery before he retires for good.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: When a hostage negotiator is falsely accused of murdering his partner, he employs desperate measures in order to clear his name.

programme.title: Fallen
programme.desc: Detective John Hobbes witnesses the execution of a demonic serial killer, Edgar Reese. However, questions arise when the murders start again, eerily matching the modus operandi of Reese.

programme.title: The Circus
programme.desc: The Tramp is hired by the proprietor of a circus after he stumbles into the middle of a performance and becomes the star attraction. He ends up falling in love with a horse rider.

programme.title: The Artist
programme.desc: Peppy Miller falls in love with the silent film star George Valentin. However, things change when Peppy becomes a famous actor while George's career goes downhill with the introduction of talkies.

programme.title: Land of the Bears
programme.desc: The filmmaker shines a light on the lives of five wild brown bears inhabiting the Kamchatka Peninsula, exploring their daily adventures and activities.

programme.title: Inside Llewyn Davis
programme.desc: As a folk singer in 1960s Greenwich Village, Llewyn Davis navigates the challenges of staying true to his art while confronting the financial realities of the music business.

programme.title: The November Man
programme.desc: Peter, a former CIA officer, is assigned the task of protecting a valuable witness, Alice, who has secret information about a Russian presidential candidate.

programme.title: The Great Dictator
programme.desc: After suffering from memory loss, a soldier returns to his former profession as a barber and attempts to escape persecution by the military forces.

programme.title: August: Osage County
programme.desc: When a family tragedy occurs, three estranged sisters visit their hometown and reunite with their dysfunctional mother who has recently been diagnosed with cancer.

programme.title: Guilty by Suspicion
programme.desc: Owing to his alleged involvement with communist parties, a film director is forbidden from working in Hollywood. Furthermore, he faces numerous challenges while fighting for his rights.

programme.title: Speed Kills
programme.desc: Wealthy speedboat racer Ben Aronoff leads a secret life that lands him in trouble with both law enforcement and drug lords.

programme.title: The Company You Keep
programme.desc: Grant, a wanted man and a former member of the revolutionary militant group, the Weather Underground, goes on the run after a journalist reveals his identity.

programme.title: Stay
programme.desc: Sam, a psychiatrist, struggles to tighten his claws at the reality while attempting to save Henry, a patient, from ending his life.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Erin Brockovich lands a job as a legal assistant at Ed Masry's law firm. Here, she builds a case against a power company after she learns that they have been polluting a town's water supply.

programme.title: Fly Me to the Moon
programme.desc: Isabelle plans to marry a stranger to break a family curse, which leads every first marriage to end in a divorce, in order to get married to her long-time boyfriend Pierre.

programme.title: Mune
programme.desc: Necross, the former guardian of the sun, turns evil and steals it. Now, Mune, Glim and Sohone, three friends, must work together to retrieve it back from him.

programme.title: The Starving Games
programme.desc: In a deadly game orchestrated by President Snowballs, skilled archer Kantmiss Evershot, her boyfriend Dale and tech-savvy ally Peter Malarkey must rely on their wits and skills to survive.

programme.title: Stars!
programme.desc: The host sheds light on various popular individuals from different walks of life and highlights their individual journeys to stardom.

programme.title: Mandira Bedi; The Love Laugh Live Show
programme.desc: Mandira Bedi: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: Down With Love
programme.desc: Barbara Novak's bold feminist book shakes up 1960s New York, sparking a sharp and witty rivalry with the charming journalist Catcher Block.

programme.title: Lay the Favorite
programme.desc: Ambitious about living the life of a cocktail waitress, a lap dancer tries her luck in Las Vegas. However, her life takes an unexpected turn after she falls in love with a sports gambler.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot, a lonely IT worker, makes a deal with the Devil, gaining seven wishes to win Alison's heart, but each wish takes an unexpected turn with hilarious and chaotic results.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: A TV newswoman takes a look at her life after a psychic tells her that she has only days to live.

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Road Chip
programme.desc: Alvin, Simon and Theodore believe that Dave is going to propose to his girlfriend, Samantha, in Miami. In a bid to retain their place in Dave's life, the three set out to stop him.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: A human-shaped spaceship, controlled by 100 mini humanoid aliens, lands on earth. However, things take an unexpected turn for the small aliens when their captain falls for a woman named Gina.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: Ben Whittaker, a 70-year-old widower, realises that he is not cut out for retirement. He then applies to become a senior intern for a sceptical boss at an online fashion site.

programme.title: The Rewrite
programme.desc: Keith Michaels, an Oscar-winning writer, teaches at the Binghamton University on the East Coast after losing his popularity in Hollywood and falls in love with Holly, a fellow teacher.

programme.title: Penelope
programme.desc: A young girl hailing from an affluent family embarks on a quest for true love to dispel a curse that has pervaded her family.

programme.title: Me Before You
programme.desc: Louisa becomes the carer of William, a cold man who has paralysis. They soon fall in love but she is devastated to hear that he does not want to live so she tries to change his mind.

programme.title: The Way, Way Back
programme.desc: Duncan, a shy teenager, visits a beach house owned by his mother's boyfriend. Annoyed with everyone, he wanders away to a local water park and meets Owen, who helps him open up to the world.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: Oren is deliberately mean to the people around him. However, he is forced to change his attitude and take help from his neighbour Leah when he is asked to look after his nine-year-old granddaughter.

programme.title: St. Vincent
programme.desc: Maggie, a working single mother, allows Vincent, a hedonistic misanthrope, to babysit her 12-year-old son Oliver. Soon, a beautiful friendship develops between Vincent and Oliver.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set
programme.desc: The key aspects of filmmaking are explored, with behind-the-scenes insights and intriguing interviews with prominent cast and crew members. United States.

programme.title: DSC
programme.desc: Talented directors provide an entertaining insight into the most intriguing stories and anecdotes concerning some of their best works. S01 E03.

programme.title: Mandira Bedi; The Love Laugh Live Show
programme.desc: Mandira Bedi: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: The Starving Games
programme.desc: In a deadly game orchestrated by President Snowballs, skilled archer Kantmiss Evershot, her boyfriend Dale and tech-savvy ally Peter Malarkey must rely on their wits and skills to survive.

programme.title: Breaking Up
programme.desc: Monica, a schoolteacher, and Steve, a photographer, have been deeply in love for over two years now. However, their impulsive natures often push their fragile relationship into an on-and-off cycle.

programme.title: The Great Dictator
programme.desc: After suffering from memory loss, a soldier returns to his former profession as a barber and attempts to escape persecution by the military forces.

programme.title: Stepmom
programme.desc: Isabel, a fashion photographer, struggles to endear herself to her divorcee boyfriend's children and his ex-wife Jackie. However, a diagnosis of terminal cancer sparks a change in their relationship.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace, who is vacationing in Paris with her friends and stepsister, is mistaken for a British heiress. Later, the three women are whisked away to Monte Carlo, where they discover royalty and romance.

programme.title: St. Vincent
programme.desc: Maggie, a working single mother, allows Vincent, a hedonistic misanthrope, to babysit her 12-year-old son Oliver. Soon, a beautiful friendship develops between Vincent and Oliver.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Two salesmen whose careers have been affected due to digitalisation take up the internship at Google and compete with younger skilled IT geniuses.

programme.title: Love Is in the Air
programme.desc: Antonie and Julie, past lovers, coincidently find themselves seated next to each other on a flight. As conversation ensues, past memories are revived, as they strive to understand each other again.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Malcolm Turner, an FBI agent, reprises his disguise as a Southern grandmother and works as a nanny to unveil the culprits responsible for designing a deadly computer virus.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective

programme.title: Fabulous Cakes

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
